title: Mercury | Wireless Door Bell/Chime with LED Indicator, Hard of Hearing, Noisy Environments
availability_text: Only 2 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Modern stylish design with silver bezel and green LED indicator
description: From the manufacturer Mercury | Wireless Door Bell/Chime with LED Indicator, Hard of Hearing, Noisy Environments A stylish battery powered wireless doorbell with an added green LED visual indication light for the hard of hearing, or noisy environments. You have the choice of 38 melodies to easily select from using the button on the back of the larger receiving unit. You can also adjust the volume with a second button on the same unit. PRODUCT FEATURES: Modern stylish design with silver bezel and green LED indicator Digital coded radio signal to prevent external interference Free standing or wall mountable Wireless range of up to 100m Simple wire free installation Choice of 38 melodies Transmitter battery is supplied(12V 23A), receiver requires 2 x AA size batteries (not supplied) Battery : receiver 4.5Vdc (2 x AA) Battery : transmitter 12Vdc (23A) Transmission frequency 433.92MHz (±150kHz) Transmission distance Up to 100m (clear line of sight) Dimensions : receiver 110 x 30 x 75mm Dimensions : transmitter 80 x 20 x 36.5mm Weight : receiver 86g (without batteries) Weight : transmitter 24g (without battery)
